operation_hours.description: Times beyond 24:00 represent next-day early morning (e.g., 25:09 = 01:09 next day)

train_capacity_note: 6-car Type-B train, rated capacity 2480, max capacity 2592
station_entry_flow_limit_note: Maximum passenger entry rate per station per minute (0 = no limit)
block_length_note: Minimum safe following distance between trains on the same track (meters)

route_choice.k_shortest_paths_note: Number of candidate routes each passenger perceives
route_choice.logit_note: Multinomial Logit model: U = epsilon + beta_tt * travel_time + beta_tf * transfer_times. Probability of choosing route i = exp(U_i) / sum(exp(U_j))
